sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110201" key="fa/lkhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φάλκης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, part of a ship, <sense id="n110201.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rib,</tr_> acc. to <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.85</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">86</biblScope> </bibl> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ τῇ στείρᾳ προσηλούμενον.</foreign> (Cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐμφαλκόομαι.</foreign>)</sense> </entryFree>
